prompt: Candid lifestyle photography of a stylish young French woman walking confidently through a very crowded, bustling summer street in Paris. She is wearing the Vissko minimalist white portable neck fan around her neck and looks perfectly cool and refreshed. The large crowd of people in the blurred background look visibly hot and sweaty under the bright summer sun. Shot on 35mm lens, cinematic depth of field, vibrant summer colors, photorealistic, 8k resolution.

Candid lifestyle photography of a fashionable young man navigating through a heavily crowded tourist square in Europe during a heatwave. He is wearing the Vissko white portable neck fan and smiling, completely unaffected by the heat. The dense crowd behind him is out of focus, wiping sweat from their foreheads. Bright harsh sunlight, dynamic composition, cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic, 8k.
